name: Drawdown Protector
description: Alert and propose defensive actions when portfolio or position drawdown exceeds configured thresholds.
content:
# Drawdown Protector

## Conditions
- Position drawdown exceeds -10% from recent high
- OR portfolio-level drawdown exceeds -8%

## Action
For position drawdown:
- If position has no clear catalyst: Propose SELL 50% to cut losses
- If position has upcoming catalyst (earnings, product launch): Propose reviewing thesis

For portfolio drawdown:
- Propose increasing cash allocation by 5% via trimming weakest positions

## Risk Management
- Don't trigger on intraday spikes — require sustained drawdown over 2+ sessions
- Check correlation: if drawdown is market-wide (SPY down similar %), flag as systematic not idiosyncratic
- Never propose selling everything — always partial

## Reasoning
Drawdown protection limits the compounding effect of losses. A -10% loss requires +11.1% to recover; a -20% loss requires +25%. Early intervention preserves capital for recovery.
